mapper.select: SELECT id, category_name, category_name as category, status, `rank`, create_time, update_time FROM category WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY `rank` ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, category_name, category_name as category, status, `rank`, create_time, update_time FROM category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, category_name, category_name as category, status, `rank`, create_time, update_time FROM category WHERE category_name = #{categoryName} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (category_name, status, `rank`, deleted) VALUES (#{categoryName}, #{status}, #{rank}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE category SET category_name = #{categoryName}, status = #{status}, `rank` = #{rank} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE category SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
